title: What is Your Purpose? | #shorts
full_text: Mom I just finished my internship and I still don't know what I want to do I don't know what my purpose is I know what your purpose is what is it it is to find happiness to find joy to find the meaning of life because you know when your rent is due when your mortgage is due you go to the bank you go to Wells Fargo bank and you say why you asking me for my money let me give you my purpose instead your purpose is to make money that is your purpose we don't need any more complicated purpose than that
